alert.name: Policy V2 7770001: Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs
alert.description: This policy contains rules which provide a greater insight into general activities occuring on the system. They are very noisy, but useful in threat hunting situations if you are looking for specific actions being taken during runtime. It is not recommended to use this policy for detection purposes unless tuning is enabled.  Additional manual tuning will likely be required.
alert.subject: Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs triggered at 04/28/2026 01:17 PM UTC
alert.body:
Policy event triggered at 04/28/2026 01:17 PM UTC

Policy:             Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs
Policy URL:         https://app.example.sysdig.com/secure//#/policies/7770001
Description:        This policy contains rules which provide a greater insight into general activities occuring on the system. They are very noisy, but useful in threat hunting situations if you are looking for specific actions being taken during runtime. It is not recommended to use this policy for detection purposes unless tuning is enabled.  Additional manual tuning will likely be required.

Timestamp:          04/28/2026 01:17 PM UTC
URL:                https://app.example.sysdig.com/secure//#/events/0000000000000000000000000000000d
Rule:               The docker client is executed in a container
Rule URL:           https://app.example.sysdig.com/secure//#/policies/rules/falco/The%20docker%20client%20is%20executed%20in%20a%20container
Severity:           Info
Scope:
    container.label.io.kubernetes.container.name:      job
    container.label.io.kubernetes.pod.namespace:      kyverno
    kubernetes.namespace.name:      kyverno
    container.id:      aaa00000000b
    kubernetes.cluster.name:      myclusterName
    host.hostName:      demo-vsphere-node-01
    container.image.id:      bbb000000001
    container.name:      job
    container.image.repo:      docker.io/alpine/k8s
    container.label.io.kubernetes.pod.name:      kyverno-test-cronjob-29483170-d2scd
    container.image.tag:      1.26.2
    kubernetes.container.name:      job
    container.image.digest:      sha256:0000111122223333444455556666777788889999aaaabbbbccccddddeeeeffff
    host.mac:      aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:01
    kubernetes.pod.name:      kyverno-test-cronjob-29483170-d2scd
    process.name:      kubectl get pod -n kyverno -l app=kyverno --field-selector=status.phase==Running -o jsonpath={.items[0].metadata.name}
    host.id:      aaaa000011112222333344445555666677778888999900001111222233334444
    kubernetes.node.name:      demo-vsphere-node-01
Actions:            No actions performed
Details:            Command kubectl with parent bash executed in container job with image docker.io/alpine/k8s under user root (proc.name=kubectl proc.exepath=/usr/bin/kubectl proc.pname=bash gparent=containerd-shim ggparent=systemd gggparent=<NA> user.name=root user.loginuid=-1 container=container_id=aaa00000000b container_name=job proc.cmdline=kubectl get pod -n kyverno -l app=kyverno --field-selector=status.phase==Running -o jsonpath={.items[0].metadata.name} evt.type=execve evt.res=SUCCESS proc.pid=2503069 proc.cwd=/apps/ proc.ppid=3216878 proc.pcmdline=bash -c echo -e "1. Checking readiness probe for kyvenro pod...\n" kyverno_pod="..."; while [[ "$kyverno_pod" != "kyverno-"* ]]; do .  kyverno_pod=`kubectl get pod -n kyverno -l app=kyverno --field-selector=status.phase==Running -o jsonpath="{.items[0].metadata.name}"` && echo Waiting;.  sleep 15;.done; echo ...Success; echo -e "apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1 \nkind: ClusterPolicy \nmetadata: \n  name: autotest-disallow-default-namespace \n  annotations: \n    pod-policies.kyverno.io/autogen-controllers: none \nspec: \n  validationFailureAction: Audit \n  background: true \n  rules: \n  - name: validate-namespace \n    match: \n      any: \n      - resources: \n          kinds: \n          - Pod \n    validate: \n      message: \"Using default namespace is not allowed.\" \n      pattern: \n        metadata: \n          namespace: \"!default\"" | kubectl apply -f -.echo -e "2. Checking policy....\n".sleep 30;.policy_status=`kubectl get cpol autotest-disallow-default-namespace -o jsonpath="{.status.ready}"`; if [[ "$policy_status" == "true" ]];  then.    echo "Verified Kyverno deployment".    kubectl delete cpol autotest-disallow-default-namespace.    exit 0.fi .echo "Failed to verify Kyverno deployment. Exiting" exit 1 proc.sid=3216878 user.uid=0 user.loginname=<NA> group.gid=0 group.name=root container.id=aaa00000000b container.name=job image=docker.io/alpine/k8s:1.26.2)

policyEvents.name: Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs
policyEvents.description: This policy contains rules which provide a greater insight into general activities occuring on the system. They are very noisy, but useful in threat hunting situations if you are looking for specific actions being taken during runtime. It is not recommended to use this policy for detection purposes unless tuning is enabled.  Additional manual tuning will likely be required.
policyEvents.output:
Command kubectl with parent bash executed in container job with image docker.io/alpine/k8s under user root (proc.name=kubectl proc.exepath=/usr/bin/kubectl proc.pname=bash gparent=containerd-shim ggparent=systemd gggparent=<NA> user.name=root user.loginuid=-1 container=container_id=aaa00000000b container_name=job proc.cmdline=kubectl get pod -n kyverno -l app=kyverno --field-selector=status.phase==Running -o jsonpath={.items[0].metadata.name} evt.type=execve evt.res=SUCCESS proc.pid=2503069 proc.cwd=/apps/ proc.ppid=3216878 proc.pcmdline=bash -c echo -e "1. Checking readiness probe for kyvenro pod...
" kyverno_pod="..."; while [[ "$kyverno_pod" != "kyverno-"* ]]; do .  kyverno_pod=`kubectl get pod -n kyverno -l app=kyverno --field-selector=status.phase==Running -o jsonpath="{.items[0].metadata.name}"` && echo Waiting;.  sleep 15;.done; echo ...Success; echo -e "apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1 
kind: ClusterPolicy 
metadata: 
  name: autotest-disallow-default-namespace 
  annotations: 
    pod-policies.kyverno.io/autogen-controllers: none 
spec: 
  validationFailureAction: Audit 
  background: true 
  rules: 
  - name: validate-namespace 
    match: 
      any: 
      - resources: 
          kinds: 
          - Pod 
    validate: 
      message: "Using default namespace is not allowed." 
      pattern: 
        metadata: 
          namespace: "!default"" | kubectl apply -f -.echo -e "2. Checking policy....
".sleep 30;.policy_status=`kubectl get cpol autotest-disallow-default-namespace -o jsonpath="{.status.ready}"`; if [[ "$policy_status" == "true" ]];  then.    echo "Verified Kyverno deployment".    kubectl delete cpol autotest-disallow-default-namespace.    exit 0.fi .echo "Failed to verify Kyverno deployment. Exiting" exit 1 proc.sid=3216878 user.uid=0 user.loginname=<NA> group.gid=0 group.name=root container.id=aaa00000000b container.name=job image=docker.io/alpine/k8s:1.26.2)

bash -c echo -e "1. Checking readiness probe for kyvenro pod...
" kyverno_pod="..."; while [[ "$kyverno_pod" != "kyverno-"* ]]; do .  kyverno_pod=`kubectl get pod -n kyverno -l app=kyverno --field-selector=status.phase==Running -o jsonpath="{.items[0].metadata.name}"` && echo Waiting;.  sleep 15;.done; echo ...Success; echo -e "apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1 
kind: ClusterPolicy 
metadata: 
  name: autotest-disallow-default-namespace 
  annotations: 
    pod-policies.kyverno.io/autogen-controllers: none 
spec: 
  validationFailureAction: Audit 
  background: true 
  rules: 
  - name: validate-namespace 
    match: 
      any: 
      - resources: 
          kinds: 
          - Pod 
    validate: 
      message: "Using default namespace is not allowed." 
      pattern: 
        metadata: 
          namespace: "!default"" | kubectl apply -f -.echo -e "2. Checking policy....
".sleep 30;.policy_status=`kubectl get cpol autotest-disallow-default-namespace -o jsonpath="{.status.ready}"`; if [[ "$policy_status" == "true" ]];  then.    echo "Verified Kyverno deployment".    kubectl delete cpol autotest-disallow-default-namespace.    exit 0.fi .echo "Failed to verify Kyverno deployment. Exiting" exit 1
